verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come and teach me Holy Spirit, Come and give me understanding; Thou art only the Revealer, Of the secret of God's holy Word.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take all from me, Lord Jesus, My shortcomings and transgressions; Teach me Thy way by the unfailing Word, I'll be upright and perfect in Thy sight.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I thank Thee God Almighty May you help, guide and keep me; May the statue you just taught me, Be seen in me in words and in deeds.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Hallelujah, Hallelujah Hallelujah, Hallelujah Praise and glory. For Thou art only To be worshipped throughout eternity
